content:
Now that the thread is chill, I'd like to say: Having been more or less in your shoes before, having so many people to satisfy, the shareholders, the clients/users and your own development team, I can only sympathize with how difficult it is to setup the priorities and the right direction for your project, the pain to not have enough time to add all the features and ideas we want, and the hearthbreaking necessity to make sacrifice and tough choice to keep moving forward. So regareless of the current state of the game, keep up your passion to see your project thriving!

People here have shared a lot of thoughts so I'll just add what would be my personal input that I havent read here (at least in english), but I feel that slapping Astral Reign mode into Arc 2 create a really awkward situation where making so many sudden changes from end of arc 1 to arc 2 just made me stop entirely advancing on story, turning it into a chore rather than enjoying it, despite I safely have a team that can clear Arc 2 on normal.
But to be clear, Astral Reign isn't a bad idea, and I especially like that while it nerf some mecanism, it compensate with something else, even if lesser benefit. It definitely needs more adjustments, but ultimately the idea itself is nice. 
But I feel like it should be turned into a madness difficulty when you want it, in the story. It's fine as default difficulty in D-Zone however.
But being imposed it when advancing on story, then discovering that there exist a material to buff stats only for that mode and is time gated, is really weird and off-putting.

On that note, I believe soulforge aptitude should be game wide buff instead of only astral reign, though soulforge would likely require adjustment in such case.
But it begs the question of what would Arc 3 be? An Astral Reign 2 mode, with a second time-gated material only for the new mode? I've already seen people joke about it.

That said, this issue isn't as important as what others have mentionned here but felt like sharing this
貓，英區都有人說降低難度了，你倒是快回應啊🙄💅
Story mode should have a mellow difficulty like in reverse 1999 honestly. I don't understand games gating the STORY behind difficult content it's annoying as hell, like in Nikke dear god lmao.
this is a hard game, it's designed to be hard
like it or not that's how the game is
More options for people who aren't ebin hardcore gamers would be nice is all.
you do have a free revive per day
Yeah I just personally think the main story should be more accessible. Rest of the game can stay as hard as it wants. Just my two cents anyways.
and also the ability to save up to 5 revives and use it all on a single stage if needed
they already nerf normal story a lot .....
